summary: Phase 5 (Final Phase) testing completed successfully. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All Phase 5 features verified: (1) OFXParserPort contract exists at expected path, (2) ProcessarLoteUseCase accepts perfil_saida_repository parameter, (3) DI factory create_processar_lote_dependencies includes SQLAlchemyPerfilSaidaRepository, (4) POST /api/v1/lotes accepts perfil_saida_id and persists it correctly, (5) GET /api/v1/output-profiles returns profiles with padrao flag, (6) Import Wizard Step 1 shows Perfil de Saída dropdown with pre-selected default profile.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/v1/output-profiles - Returns 2 profiles with padrao flag (1 marked as padrao)
✅ POST /api/v1/lotes with perfil_saida_id - Creates lote and persists perfil_saida_id
✅ POST /api/v1/lotes without perfil_saida_id - Creates lote with null perfil_saida_id
✅ OFXParserPort, TransacaoOFX, ExtratoOFX classes can be imported
✅ DI module has get_perfil_saida_repository and create_processar_lote_dependencies
✅ Frontend: Import Wizard at /upload loads correctly with 4-step stepper
✅ Frontend: Step 1 shows Perfil de Saída dropdown (data-testid='perfil-saida-select')
✅ Frontend: Perfil dropdown has 3 options (Padrão TXT, Domínio Sistemas default, ISO AÇO custom)
✅ Frontend: Default profile 'Domínio Sistemas - TXT Delimitado' is pre-selected (padrao=true)
✅ Frontend: /upload/classic loads legacy upload form with Perfil de Saída
✅ Frontend: /lotes page loads and shows lotes table
✅ Frontend: Dashboard, Layouts, Mapeamentos, Perfis de Saída pages load correctly
seed_data_creation: Test lotes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 (final phase) fully verified. All 5 phases complete. Key features: (1) OFXParserPort contract at /app/backend/src/application/ports/services/ofx_parser_port.py - abstract class with parse() and validar() methods, (2) ProcessarLoteUseCase._gerar_saida() method uses perfil_saida_repository when lote.perfil_saida_id is set, (3) Import Wizard Step 1 loads perfis via perfisSaidaApi.listar() and pre-selects the padrao profile, (4) Classic upload at /upload/classic also has Perfil de Saída dropdown.

phase5_verification.ofx_parser_port: VERIFIED - Contract exists with TransacaoOFX, ExtratoOFX dataclasses and OFXParserPort abstract class
phase5_verification.processar_lote_with_perfil_saida: VERIFIED - ProcessarLoteUseCase accepts perfil_saida_repository, uses OutputGeneratorFactory when perfil is set
phase5_verification.lote_api_with_perfil_saida_id: VERIFIED - POST /api/v1/lotes accepts and persists perfil_saida_id
phase5_verification.import_wizard_perfil_selector: VERIFIED - Dropdown with pre-selected default profile
phase5_verification.regression_tests: VERIFIED - detect, test-parse, layouts, lotes, estatisticas all working
